category_sources: source_facts.description: Command-line interface to the WakaTime API; official WakaTime GitHub organization describes wakatime-cli as the command-line interface used by WakaTime text editor plugins.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name: wakatime-cli; official repository is wakatime/wakatime-cli.
docs_sources: Official repository README documents the CLI; official WakaTime developer docs reference wakatime-cli behavior and API usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/wakatime/wakatime-cli; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names WakaTime API CLI; official WakaTime GitHub organization describes open-source editor-plugin tooling and wakatime-cli.
